mapper.insert: insert into school_backend_manage.user (user_no, password, username, role, phone, email,gender,create_time) values (#{userNo}, #{password}, #{username}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender} , #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE school_backend_manage.user SET password = #{password}, username = #{username}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email} WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
